title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Haier India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Haier India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Haier India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Haier India:
Haier India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India!
